titleStmt.title: SII 20.206: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 206. (B.K. No. 13 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: The inscription records a gift of land, garden, etc., made, after purchase, by Saṅgayya, for the benefit of the temple of Remmēśvara, constructed by him in the premises of the temple of Sōmanātha at Purikara-nagara and named after his grand preceptor Remmarasa, when Malliseṭṭi was governing Karṇāṭa-vishaya. Malliseṭṭi's son Rēva is mentioned. It states that Saṅgayya was the pupil of Aichidēva, a disciple of Remmarasa who was a disciple of Kēśava-daṇḍanātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāvē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © © © ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ caturanavadyavi
dyāsamuddhārakaṁ gūrjjaravāraṇāṁkuśaṁ teluṁgabhaṁgavidhāyakaṁ yādavacakravarttiyu mappa siṁhaṇakṣōṇipāḷana mahōṁnati
yeṁtene . ka . Amama parākramanidhi bhillamabhūpatiyarare tatsutaṁ jayitugi lōkamaneṟa gisidaṁ bāpputtamanātana sūnu
siṁhaṇaṁ pesarvvaḍedaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . dhuradhareyoḷu māṟaṁtaraniradikki parākramaikalakṣmi
ge nijabaṁdhurabhujamaṁ nelamāḍalu dharitriyoḷu varyyanāryya mallane ballaṁ . tattanayaṁ . ka . cāgada bhōga
da rāgada sāgaravenisirdda peṁpu poṁpuḷi tanageṁbī guṇadināryya rēvaṁ śrīgadhipati rūḍhivaḍedanūrjjitatē
jaṁ . va . Aṁtā koṁkaṇacakravarttiyāryyamalliseṭṭi duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ karṇnāṭaviṣayadoḷarasu
geyyuttamire . ka . jaḷanidhiparivṛtadharaṇīvaḷayavadhūkāṁtakuṁtaḷaṁ rūḍhiya kuṁtaḷaviṣa
yamadaṟoḷesevudu sale dakṣiṇavāraṇāśi purikaranagaraṁ . va . Adaṟoḷu dēvara cakravartti yesevaṁ śrī
sōmanāthaṁ guṇāspadanīrēḷumiḷātaḷaṁgaḷoḍeyaṁ mūrttisvayaṁbhūttamaṁ madanadhvaṁsi lasa
�śūlaḍamarubhyābhāsibhāḷēkṣaṇaṁ viditaṁ naṁditanaṁdivāhanayutaṁ śrī pārvvatī
saṁgataṁ . dānaṁ kaḷpamahījarājige samānaṁ kīrtti lōkatrayādhīnaṁ mikka parōpakārani
raṁ śiṣṭēṣṭatuṣṭipradaṁ jñānaṁ sadbudhasaṁtatistutikaraṁ tānādudēṁ dhanyanō sthānācāryyava
rēṇyanapratimapuṇyaṁ jñānasōmāhvayaṁ . Enesuṁ kēśavadaṁḍanāthanesedaṁ mā
hēśvarakhyātanātana putraṁ śivaraṁmya reṁmarasanudyadbhaktisaṁpannanātana putraṁ negaḷdaicidēvaśivayōgi
kṣētrasaṁnyāsiyātana putraṁ budhamitranīśapadasēvāsaṁgamaṁ saṁgamaṁ . va . ma
ttamā saṁgayyana guruvina mahimayeṁtene . v® . samayācārakke kaigaṁnaḍi sakaḷakaḷā prauḍhigāyuṣya
minnanyamatakkaurvvānaḷaṁ bhāktikavanake vasaṁtāgamaṁ śiṣyavarggakkamṛtāṁbhōvarṣaṇaṁ manmatha
pṛthuvibhavakkaṁtakaṁ sōmanāthakramapaṁkējakke matta(ṁ)bhramaranenisidaṁ bhāvipaṁdai ci
dēvaṁ . ka . dīnānāthaśaraṇyaṁ bhūnutapuṇyaṁ vivēkanidhi guṇaniḷayaṁ tānesedane dēvanamānitapadapa
dmayugaḷabhṛṁgaṁ saṁgaṁ . va . Enisida saṁgayyanā śrī sōmanāthadēvadēvōta mana parisūtraprākā
radiṁdamoḷage pūrvadigbhāgadoḷu tannārādhyanappaicarasaśivayōgiya paramagura remmarasa
ra śrīnāmadiṁ śivālayamaṁ śilāmayamuṁ suvarṇakaḷaśaviḷasitamumāge māḍisiyalli
reṁmēśvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ jagaṁ pogaḷe māḍiyā śrī reṁmēśvaradēvara śrī kāryakkeṁdu go
ggiyācārya pālyakīrtipaṁḍitara kayyoḷu saṁgayya krayarūpadiṁ koṁḍa
kōṭeya keyya mattarāṟaṟoḷagaṇa hēmakīrttidēvara bhāgada mūṟu mattariṁ baḍagalu gaḍugeya
keyyiṁda mūḍalu rāmēsvaradēvara keyyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu śaṁkhajinālayada holadiṁ paḍuvalu
caturāghāṭada liṁgamudreya nālkuṁ kalliṁdoḷagaṇa mūṟu mattarumara mattaṁ U
kētagāuṁḍana kayyoḷu saṁgayyanu krayarūpadiṁ koṁḍa saṁpagaya tōṭa
yiṁ baḍagalu . paḍihāṟa rātayyana kayyiṁda paḍavalu
ttariṁ teṁkalu . baḷḷadiṁ mūḍalu
voḷagaṇeraḍu mattarumaṁ
vaiśākhamāsada huṁṇna
Digital edition of SII 20.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
